exercises.title: Write your first function
exercises.description: Write a function named `greeting`. In the function, it should print "Hello!". Call this function.

exercises.title: Add a parameter
exercises.description: Write a function named `greetPerson`. Add a parameter to it called `name`. In the function, it should print "Greetings, " + name. Call this function with your name as input.

exercises.title: Return a value
exercises.description:
Write a function named `double`. Add a parameter called `number`. In the function, it should *return* number * 2.

For example:
```js
console.log(double(5));
```
This should print `10` to the console.
